title: carex × viadrina
intro: Carex × viadrina, also known as Vi-Drina sedge, is a hybrid of the Carex species, specifically a cross between Carex otrubae and Carex aquatilis. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to treat various urinary issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and helping to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and gout. In herbal preparations, Carex × viadrina is often dried and used in teas or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential uses.
